query:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.department, 
  p.research_field,
  ufi.image_url
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN university_field_images ufi 
  ON p.research_field = ufi.research_field_name 
  AND ufi.university_name = 'University of Washington'
WHERE p.university_name = 'University of Washington'
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 20;
command:

  p.name, 
  p.department, 
  p.research_field,
  ufi.image_url
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN university_field_images ufi 
  ON p.research_field = ufi.research_field_name 
  AND ufi.university_name = 'University of Washington'
WHERE p.university_name = 'University of Washington'
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 20;
